title: Suitable Employment Rebuttal for Existing Degree Denial
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: VR&E Case Manager

Subject: Response to Position That Current Degrees Already Lead to Suitable Employment
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

I request reconsideration of the position that my current degrees or credentials already provide suitable employment.

My existing credentials are: {{existingCredentials}}.
These credentials usually lead to: {{currentCredentialJobs}}.

Those jobs are not suitable in my case because: {{unsuitableWhy}}.

The occupation I am requesting is: {{targetOccupation}}.
The education, license, or credential normally needed for that occupation is: {{requiredCredential}}.

VA's stated rationale was: {{vaRationale}}.

Please evaluate whether my current credentials truly lead to suitable employment that I can obtain and maintain without worsening service-connected disabilities, and provide any contrary rationale in writing.

Respectfully,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
